title: engram whats-new
description: Typed source of truth for `engram whats-new`. Authored alongside CHANGELOG.md during a release — the /release skill writes both from the same draft so they cannot drift.

headline.description: One-line TL;DR of what this release means to a user.

fixes_summary.description: One-line roll-up of bug fixes. Avoid enumerating — users rarely need each fix described separately.

title.description: Short name for the feature/change. Bold in the rendered output.

summary.description: User-facing description. What can the user now do? Not 'we refactored X'.

command.description: CLI command this introduces or touches, e.g. 'engram reconcile'.

migration.description: Required for entries under `breaking`, `changed` (when action is needed), and `removed`. One sentence describing what the user must do.

docs.description: Optional doc link (repo-relative path or full URL).
